shoes_neg: a product that is not a pair of sports shoes
a fashion item that is not athletic footwear
an apparel product that is not sports shoes
yellow_pos: a product that has yellow in its color
a fashion item featuring the color yellow
a product whose colors include yellow
yellow_neg: a product that does not have yellow
a product without any yellow color
a product whose colors do not include yellow
silver_pos: a product that has silver in its color
a fashion item featuring the color silver
a product whose colors include silver
silver_neg: a product that does not have silver
a product without any silver color
a product whose colors do not include silver

cascade_form: Decomposed AND-cascade: 3 sub-filters (shoes / yellow / silver), each with numerical thresholds (TAU_HIGH=0.1, TAU_LOW=-0.02). AND-combine: 3-confident_yes -> cascade YES; any-confident_no -> cascade NO; else -> BQ verifies. Stage 2 is sembench q2.sql verbatim on sub-EXTERNAL-TABLE

calibration.method: AI.GENERATE_BOOL on Q2 image prompt + thinking_budget=0

baseline.sql:
SELECT
  ARRAY_FIRST(SPLIT(ARRAY_LAST(SPLIT(images.uri, '/')), '.')) as id
FROM EXTERNAL_OBJECT_TRANSFORM(TABLE `fashion_product_images.IMAGES`, ['SIGNED_URL']) as images
WHERE true
  AND AI.IF(
    ('The image shows a (pair of) sports shoe(s) that feature the colors yellow and silver.',
     images.ref),
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
  )

cascade.method: Decomposed AND-cascade: 3 sub-filters with absolute thresholds; AND-aware combine; Stage 1 sub-EXTERNAL-TABLE on uncertain GCS URIs; Stage 2 sembench q2.sql verbatim

stage2_run.sql:
SELECT
  ARRAY_FIRST(SPLIT(ARRAY_LAST(SPLIT(images.uri, '/')), '.')) as id
FROM EXTERNAL_OBJECT_TRANSFORM(TABLE `fashion_product_images.q2_uncertain`, ['SIGNED_URL']) as images
WHERE true
  AND AI.IF(
    ('The image shows a (pair of) sports shoe(s) that feature the colors yellow and silver.',
     images.ref),
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
  )
